summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Bingo Blast multiplayer game. 27/27 backend tests pass (100%) covering guest login, daily reward, spin wheel, rooms CRUD/join, computer match (create/call/claim), leaderboard, tournaments, achievements, friends (bidirectional via friend_code), shop, mocked Razorpay create-order + verify (grants Bcoins), and WebSocket multiplayer (room_state -> start -> game_started -> number_called every 3s). Frontend tested on 375x667 mobile viewport: splash -> onboarding (Skip works) -> login -> 'Play as Guest' -> Home dashboard with avatar/balance(500)/daily-reward/4 play-mode cards/tournament banner. Bottom nav all 5 tabs (home, rooms, shop, leaderboard, profile) navigate correctly via testIDs. Computer game screen renders 5x5 BINGO grid (testID bingo-cell-r-c), called number, claim-bingo-btn. All 23 screens reachable: spin-wheel, tournaments, achievements, friends, wallet, settings, game-modes, invite-friends, create-room, waiting-room, error-state, etc. No console errors or red screen.

minor.issue: Use query-string params instead of JSON body; works but slightly inconsistent with rest of API (JSON bodies).
Re-joining an already-joined room returns 200 with existing room (silent), not idempotent error - acceptable but undocumented.

issues: Deprecated style props warnings: shadow*, textShadow*, Image style.resizeMode, props.pointerEvents. Non-blocking but should be migrated to boxShadow/textShadow style/style.pointerEvents and resizeMode prop.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor warnings: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 expected 2.2.0; expo-clipboard@55.0.13 expected ~8.0.8; expo-linear-gradient@55.0.13 expected ~15.0.8. Project still works in web preview but should be aligned for native builds.

action_items: (Optional polish) Migrate deprecated RN web style props (shadow*, textShadow*, pointerEvents, Image.resizeMode) to remove console warnings.
(Optional) Align Expo SDK package versions reported by expo doctor before native builds.
(Optional) Standardize daily-reward/spin-wheel/tournament-register to accept JSON body instead of query params for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~920 lines - acceptable for MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth, rooms, matches, shop, payments, ws) once it grows past 1000 lines.
Razorpay mocked path correctly returns mocked:true and grants Bcoins on verify. Production path verifies signature - good.
WebSocket auto-caller cancels properly on bingo win or disconnect; uses asyncio.Task and 3s tick - clean.
All MongoDB documents go through strip_mongo() to remove _id - good.
All env vars sourced from .env (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, RAZORPAY_*); frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL - compliant.

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (all 23 screens reachable, key flows work)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ guest users via device_id TEST_device_<pid> and TEST_device2_<pid>. Used for friends, rooms, computer-match, websocket and Razorpay mock tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints + key UI flows pass. To re-run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Razorpay is in MOCKED mode (no keys configured). WebSocket test uses websocket-client (now installed). Guest login is idempotent per device_id. Important testIDs present on Home: home-dashboard, home-header, wallet-balance-display, daily-reward-card, play-computer-btn, play-multiplayer-btn, play-free-btn, play-paid-btn, tournament-banner, tab-home/rooms/shop/leaderboard/profile, user-avatar-btn, quick-shop/spin/friends/tournaments. Game screen: bingo-board-grid, bingo-cell-{r}-{c}, claim-bingo-btn, chat-overlay-btn, game-screen.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Build is solid for first E2E iteration.
